creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
From Vsevolod Volkov, maintainer of ua.freebsd.org:
> I've just removed IN A of dead ftp5 and ftp7.
> ftp was a CNAME to ftp5. I've changed it to CNAME ftp6.

I confirmed that ftp.ua.freebsd.org is now working again.  I have removed ftp7.ua.freebsd.org from bsdinstall and bsdconfig.

Thanks again for reporting this.
